response.original_title: I Wish I Could See Heaven
response.overview: A contract killer faces a life-altering choice when offered the chance to retire, provided he completes one last job. Balancing the cold brutality of his profession with the tender care of his comatose mother, he must confront his past, navigate a dangerous final assignment, and grapple with the elusive hope for redemption.
response.title: I Wish I Could See Heaven
